title: Rockstar will not release GTA 6 in physical format, not even months after launch
summary: Multiple reports confirm that the long-awaited sequel will not have a physical disc edition, and Xbox reacts to the interest in pre-orders on PlayStation.

title: Developers on strike say Star Wars Eclipse cannot be completed if layoffs continue
summary: Quantic Dream employees warn that the game is in serious trouble without more staff.

title: Deltarune Chapter 5 guides and reactions, now available on Nintendo Switch
summary: The new chapter of Toby Fox's RPG generates guide coverage, scene analysis, and bug reports on Switch.

title: Lenovo predicts that high RAM prices could become the new normal
summary: The company warns that the RAM price crisis could be permanent.

title: Sony will remove 550 purchased movies from PlayStation, generating criticism about digital ownership
summary: Users report that previously purchased movies will be deleted from their digital libraries.

title: Meccha Chameleon becomes a viral success, selling 10 million copies in 16 days
summary: The indie hide-and-seek game becomes a global sales phenomenon.

title: Granblue Fantasy Versus: Rising will come to Switch 2 in September with new DLC character
summary: The fighting game confirms its version for Nintendo's new console and adds Id as a fighter.

title: Bloodwoven is an immersive survival game set in the frozen corpse of a god
summary: The new game from the director of Blood West promises a shooting and survival experience in a frozen world.

summary: Bolin, Ty Lee, Lin Beifong, and Uncle Iroh will join the fighting game roster.

title: Gaming media shares their weekend recommendations
summary: Specialized publications publish their usual weekly game roundups.

title: Palworld version 1.0 update includes 27 pages of changes and new features
summary: The successful survival and creature-capturing title receives its long-awaited definitive patch.

title: Path of Exile 2 receives surprise updates that solidify it as an ARPG titan
summary: The sequel to the acclaimed action RPG prepares to revolutionize the genre this year.

title: Civilization 7 developers talk about 20th century leaders and colonialism in the game
summary: Firaxis discusses how it approaches controversial history and contentious figures in its 4X strategy game.

title: Operation Flashpoint will receive a remaster and Bohemia releases its engine source code
summary: The classic military simulator comes back to life with a modernized version.

title: The Steam Summer Sale is now available with discounts up to 90%
summary: Valve's platform kicks off its traditional sales event with a selection of standout games for under 10 euros.

title: An animated Tetris series announced
summary: The iconic puzzle video game will have its own animated television adaptation.

title: Pokémon fans fear that scalpers will ruin the 30th anniversary collaboration
summary: The community expresses concern over the scarcity and speculation of commemorative products.

title: A24 faces criticism for its controversial partnership with Google's artificial intelligence
summary: The acclaimed independent studio defends its agreement with Gemini amid fan backlash.

title: Mark Zuckerberg plans to launch a betting app similar to Polymarket
summary: The Meta CEO aims to compete in the prediction market with a new gambling platform.

title: Sega admits its 2025 sales have been disappointing and announces a strategy change
summary: The Japanese company acknowledges the poor commercial performance of two of its most important releases of the year.
